results.rendered_html:
anāyata a.
1 Unrestrained,
(pb) unchecked.
2 Not propped or supported.
3 Not long, of short duration; anāyatasvabhāvabhaṃgurāṇi sukhāni  K. 175. 
4 Continuous, close, unseparated.
